lines.speaker: Edmond
lines.text: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so special about your capes?

lines.speaker: Edmond
lines.text: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you

lines.speaker: Edmond
lines.text: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.

lines.speaker: Edmond
lines.text: So would you like to buy one?
